pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and Jakarta EE namespace requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and uses the javax.* namespace, causing compatibility issues with modern libraries and JDKs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run against Java 21 features and bytecode version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the legacy MySQL connector artifact with the new group ID and artifact ID required by Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: The artifact 'mysql-connector-java' is deprecated/removed in favor of 'mysql-connector-j' in newer Spring Boot versions; using the old one may cause dependency resolution failures or runtime incompatibilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the JAXB runtime dependency to replace the removed Java EE module in Java 11+.
pom.xml.why_exists: JAXB was removed from the JDK in Java 11; without this dependency, JAXB-related code will fail at runtime with NoClassDefFoundError.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Jakarta XML Bind API dependency to align with the javax to jakarta namespace migration in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 uses Jakarta EE namespaces (jakarta.xml.bind) instead of Java EE (javax.xml.bind); without this API, compilation or runtime will fail due to missing classes.

src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with functional security configuration to comply with Spring Security 6 requirements.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is removed in Spring Security 6; extending it causes a compile error.

src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Replace deprecated @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity with @EnableMethodSecurity to align with Spring Security 6.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.why_exists: @EnableGlobalMethodSecurity is removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes a compile error.

src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Migrate HttpSecurity DSL from chained method calls to lambda-based configuration.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.why_exists: The chained DSL methods (e.g., .cors().and()) are removed in Spring Security 6; using them causes a compile error.

src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Replace antMatchers with requestMatchers in authorization rules.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.why_exists: antMatchers is removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes a compile error.

src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet imports to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.why_exists: ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime because javax.servlet classes are no longer present in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+.

src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet imports to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.why_exists: Compilation failure: the class javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest does not exist in the Jakarta EE 9+ module system used by Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.

src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet imports to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.why_exists: Compilation failure: the class javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse does not exist in the Jakarta EE 9+ module system used by Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.

src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet imports to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.why_exists: Compilation failure: package javax.servlet does not exist in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x which relies on Jakarta EE 9+ APIs.

src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to align with Spring Boot 3's Jakarta EE 9+ namespace.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are no longer available on the classpath in Spring Boot 3, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Migrate JAXB import from javax.xml.bind to jakarta.xml.bind to comply with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.why_exists: Compilation error: package javax.xml.bind does not exist in Java 21 / Spring Boot 3 environments where JAXB is provided under the jakarta namespace.

src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/github/javaguide/springsec.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' errors on JDK 21 with Spring Boot 3.

src/test/java/github/javaguide/springsec.general_idea: Migrate test annotations from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/test/java/github/javaguide/springsec.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires JUnit 5; JUnit 4 annotations like @RunWith and org.junit.Test are either removed or cause runtime/compile errors in the new test context.
